message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should apply block discount when 3 alike components are insured"
Expected behavior: generateQuote([{type: "rune"}, {type: "rune"}, {type: "rune"}], customer) returns object with basePremium of 60
Current error: Expected 60, Received 75 (3 x 25 = 75, but block of exactly 3 alike components = 60)
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

Context:
- Block discount applies when exactly 3 components of the same type are in the policy
- Block of 3 alike components costs 60 G (not 3×25=75)
- 4 runes → 100 G (no block - needs exactly 3), 2 runes → 50 G (no block)

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: Let me start by reading the current state of the files.

The current implementation simply sums up base premiums. For 3 runes that gives 75, but the test expects 60 (a block discount). I need to add minimal logic to detect exactly 3 alike components and apply the block price of 60.

The minimal implementation: count items by type, and if any type has exactly 3 items, use 60 for that group instead of 3×25=75.

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_07-09-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text: Now let me run the tests to verify.

content.text:
All 7 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added grouping logic to count items by type, then apply a block price of 60 when exactly 3 items of the same type are present, otherwise use the normal per-item price.
**Result**: All tests now pass (7 passing, 19 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal - only the count-equals-3 branch was added to handle the new test. No general discount system, no configuration, no handling of other quantities. The hardcoded value 60 matches exactly what the test demands.

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_07-09-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6/src/claim-office.ts`
